# cross_validation

Run k-fold cross-validation on a dataset using a configurable sklearn model. Returns a DataFrame with per-fold train score, test score, and fit time. Useful for model selection and diagnosing overfitting before committing to a final model.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame |
| `target_column` | `str` | Target column name |
| `feature_columns` | `List[str]` | Feature columns to use |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | ŌĆö | Dagster asset group name |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | ŌĆö | Asset owners ŌĆö list of team names or email addresses, e.g. ['team:analytics', 'user@company.com'] |
| `asset_tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | ŌĆö | Additional key-value tags to apply to the asset, e.g. {'domain': 'finance', 'tier': 'gold'} |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | ŌĆö | Asset kinds for the Dagster catalog, e.g. ['snowflake', 'python']. Auto-inferred from component name if not set. |
| `column_lineage` | `Dict[str, List[str]]` | ŌĆö | Column-level lineage mapping: output column name ŌåÆ list of upstream column names it was derived from, e.g. {'revenue': ['price', 'quantity']} |
| `description` | `str` | ŌĆö | Asset description shown in the Dagster catalog. |
| `deps` | `List[str]` | ŌĆö | Lineage-only upstream asset keys (no data passed at runtime). |

### Freshness

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `freshness_max_lag_minutes` | `int` | ŌĆö | Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before the asset is considered stale. Defines a FreshnessPolicy. |
| `freshness_cron` | `str` | ŌĆö | Cron schedule string for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays at 9am). |

### Partitions

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `partition_type` | `str` | ŌĆö | Partition type: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'hourly', 'static', 'multi', or None for unpartitioned |
| `partition_start` | `str` | ŌĆö | Partition start date in ISO format, e.g. '2024-01-01'. Required for time-based partition types. |
| `partition_date_column` | `str` | ŌĆö | Column used to filter upstream DataFrame to the current date partition key. |
| `partition_dimensions` | `List[Dict[str, Any]]` | ŌĆö | Multi-axis partition spec: list of {name, type, start, values, dynamic_partition_name} dicts. Overrides flat fields when set. |
| `partition_values` | `str` | ŌĆö | Comma-separated values for static or multi partitioning, e.g. 'customer_a,customer_b,customer_c'. |
| `partition_static_dim` | `str` | ŌĆö | Dimension name for the static axis in multi-partitioning, e.g. 'customer' or 'region'. |
| `partition_static_column` | `str` | ŌĆö | Column used to filter upstream DataFrame to the current static partition dimension (e.g. 'customer_id'). |

### Retry policy

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `retry_policy_max_retries` | `int` | ŌĆö | Max retries on asset failure. Defines a RetryPolicy. Useful for transient network failures, rate limits, etc. |
| `retry_policy_delay_seconds` | `int` | ŌĆö | Seconds between retries (default 1). |
| `retry_policy_backoff` | `str` | `"exponential"` | Backoff strategy: 'linear' or 'exponential'. |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `model_type` | `str` | `"random_forest"` | Model to evaluate: 'random_forest', 'logistic_regression', 'gradient_boosting', 'decision_tree', 'linear_regression' |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `task_type` | `str` | `"classification"` | 'classification' or 'regression' |
| `cv_folds` | `int` | `5` | Number of cross-validation folds |
| `scoring` | `str` | ŌĆö | sklearn scoring string (None = 'accuracy' for classification, 'r2' for regression) |
| `random_state` | `int` | `42` | Random seed for reproducibility |
| `dynamic_partition_name` | `str` | ŌĆö | Name for DynamicPartitionsDefinition (when partition_type='dynamic'), e.g. 'tenants'. |
| `include_preview_metadata` | `bool` | `false` | Include a preview of the output data in metadata (first 25 rows or a sample) for builder UIs. |
| `preview_rows` | `int` | `25` | Rows to include in the preview metadata. For long DataFrames (>10x preview_rows), a random sample is used; otherwise head(). |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Supported Models

| `model_type` | Classification | Regression |
|---|---|---|
| `random_forest` | RandomForestClassifier | RandomForestRegressor |
| `logistic_regression` | LogisticRegression | LinearRegression |
| `gradient_boosting` | GradientBoostingClassifier | GradientBoostingRegressor |
| `decision_tree` | DecisionTreeClassifier | DecisionTreeRegressor |
| `linear_regression` | ŌĆö | LinearRegression |

## Output Columns

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `fold` | Fold number (1-indexed) |
| `train_score` | Score on training split |
| `test_score` | Score on held-out split |
| `fit_time` | Seconds to fit the model |

## Example YAML

```yaml
component_type: cross_validation
description: Evaluate gradient boosting with 10-fold CV.

asset_name: churn_cv_results
upstream_asset_key: customer_features_enriched
target_column: churned
feature_columns:
  - days_since_last_order
  - total_orders
model_type: gradient_boosting
cv_folds: 10
group_name: model_evaluation
```

## Metadata Logged

`mean_test_score`, `std_test_score`, `mean_train_score`, `scoring_metric`, `cv_folds`, `model_type`

## Requirements

- `dagster`
- `pandas`
- `scikit-learn`
